main.description: A vote on a community-defined RAQ axis, signaling support for its inclusion.

axisId.description: Reference to the community axis being voted on

voteNullifier.description: Privacy-preserving one-person-one-vote nullifier for this RAQ axis, issued by m8.

eligibilityProofRef.description: Opaque reference to the m8 eligibility/nullifier proof used to cast this vote.
